creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195054
10.31

Hi Mark,

The attached patch updates pcre2 to 10.31. You'll need to svn rm files/patch-CVE-2016-3191 before committing.

The pcre2 port is about 2.5 years out-of-date, so lots of things have changed. I've tested against every port I could reasonably build, but I don't know if an exp-run is warranted here or not.
